name: positive_safety_b10_split_seed0
notes: first_pass_batch_ids=[0] should be used for the initial run.
extension_batch_ids=[1,2] can be added later without regenerating the split.
delta_p and endpoint_delta conditions should share the same composition batches.
eval split is stratified and not dev300-proportional; use original_bucket_weights for estimated dev300 metrics.

bucket_definitions.C_clean: current correct and not retrieval failure
bucket_definitions.W_other: current wrong but not retrieval failure
